hooks.name: prevent-curl-bypass
hooks.description: Prevents the AI from bypassing the verification pipeline by closing Kanban tickets via CLI tools like curl or gh.

hooks.name: qa-gate
hooks.description: Prevents the AI Orchestrator from directly closing tickets to enforce the verification pipeline.

hooks.name: git-push-after
hooks.description: Automatically watches GitHub Actions workflows after a git push

hooks.name: remind-comment
hooks.command: echo '{"message": "REMINDER: If you just updated the ticket, do not forget to add a comment detailing your changes using mcp_kanban_update_ticket or another tool."}'
hooks.description: Reminds the AI to add a comment after updating a ticket.
